Paper Title: Current Approaches to Tactical Performance Analyses in Soccer Using Position Data

Purpose: Synthesize empirical work on collective tactical behaviours measured with positional data.

Paper Title: Process Mining of Football Event Data: A Novel Approach for Tactical Insights Into the Game

Paper Title: An Automated System for Generating Tactical Performance Statistics for Individual Soccer Players From Videos
Journal: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
Purpose: Generate individual tactical statistics automatically from soccer video.

Paper Title: A Machine Learning Approach for Player and Position Adjusted Expected Goals in Football (Soccer)

Paper Title: TacticAI: an AI Assistant for Football Tactics

Paper Title: The Principles of Tactical Formation Identification in Association Football (Soccer) — a Survey
